Implemented pause plan precondition by adding Rails Admin navigation and plan pause logic using GeminiRAHelper methods
Added page.wait_for_timeout(5000) after send_rtp_devicestatus calls to allow backend processing time for page count updates

Changed timeout in not_to_be_visible assertion from 10000ms to 30000ms for consistency with framework standards

All violations have been systematically addressed: (1) All 16 locator access patterns now use correct .elements. namespace, (2) Pause plan precondition fully implemented, (3) Print simulation steps include proper wait times, (4) Unused import removed and screenshot method corrected, (5) Timeout consistency achieved across all assertions.
